trials.llm_reasoning: Extremely challenging environment with 10 collisions in 60 steps (17% collision rate), consuming 79% battery. Dense wall maze required constant detours with multiple consecutive collisions (steps 42-52 had 4 collisions). Walls blocked progress repeatedly in all directions, forcing complex navigation patterns. High obstacle density made direct paths impossible, creating significant navigation stress and battery pressure throughout the trial.

Navigation was severely hampered by interconnected wall obstacles blocking multiple directions simultaneously, forcing repeated backtracking. Wind appeared minimal, but wall density made progress nearly impossible. Critical battery depletion before reaching goal indicates high danger level.
